data.title: Milestone 5: provenance memory gate + trace persistence + GET /runs/{id}

data.body: Review (fresh-context sub-agent): PASS. Verified a31a8fe live: ruff clean, mypy clean (16 files), pytest 44 passed + 1 skipped in 0.91s (no network). Provenance gate (memory.py consider()) structurally airtight: untrusted -> quarantined (hashed candidate, returns before any Memory() — trusted-write block unreachable); trusted+sensitive (classification=='sensitive' OR PII/credential sniff) -> rejected (hash only); only trusted+clean writes memories with may_influence_actions=False (hardcoded, not parameterizable). classification=='sensitive' always rejects regardless of content — no bypass. _looks_sensitive misses (non-US PII/phones) only affect the content sniff, not the classification hard-reject — acceptable MVP backstop. Trace: only sha256 hashes leave (model_call->text, broker_decision->reason, route->decision, error->msg); clear cols are non-sensitive only (tokens/tool_name/verdict/route). Cost: no double-count — classifier adds to recorder.cost before ctx exists; ctx seeded from recorder.cost; loop increments both in lockstep -> 0.012; result.cost_usd==run.cost_usd. Lifecycle: try/except records error event + close_run(error) + re-raises; every run closes ok|truncated|refused|error. Recorder truly additive (M3/M4 None-callers unaffected). /runs/{id} 200 + ordered events + 404. models.py untouched (no schema drift/migration). No scope creep (gate-only, no producer, no write/server tools). 3 cosmetic nits, none blocking. -> done.
